llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/FB - Software Engineer (m/f/d)
job.description: SAP Consultant OrgCode: GDE/D Product Team: Click or tap here to enter text. Responsibilities: You will be responsible for ensuring the operation and project delivery across all phases you will execute business requirements engineering and ensure provisioning of standard IT features - You will do error analysis and corrections of Incident and Problems (Provide 2nd and/or 3rd level support). - As part of our agile development team you will work on user stories, do the development and testing of new features. - With your extensive experience on the subject matter, you will guide, coach and train other team members build competencies for the respective modules. - You will be assigned projects where you will have end to end responsibility for all deliverables Qualifications: - Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Business, IT, or a related field, combined with 5–8 years of relevant professional experience. - Strong functional expertise and hands‑on experience in SAP Transportation Management (LE‑TRA, TM 9.x, or SAP S/4HANA TM). - Strong self‑organization skills, including a high sense of responsibility, creative problem‑solving, and sound decision‑making. - High level of personal commitment and passion, characterized by an entrepreneurial mindset, empathy, perseverance, and a strong results orientation.G4 - Strong collaboration skills, including teamwork, reliability, structured problem‑solving, and conflict‑resolution capabilities. What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. [to include specific local benefits].
